highlights.text: I wrote in my Wednesday 4pm newsletter: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
I then wrote in yesterdays newsletter at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
For every “elevator down” selloff, there is an equally powerful and often more vicious short squeeze loading.
After CPI day on Wednesday, we saw another “elevator down” move and like all elevator down moves, that lead to another vicious short squeeze and phase of buy the dips.

post_title: Are ATHs Coming Next Week For SPX? Not So Fast. Sept 16 Plan
